productDisplayName: Puma Men Yacht Lifevest Yellow Casual Shoes
description: It's time to vacation and party, so do it in style at beach side resorts this season. And don't you forget to carry your pair of Yacht Lifevest shoes from puma to keep your feet dry and protected while you lose yourself with the fun water Sports. The puma Yacht Lifevest shoe comes with a quick drying upper, slip-resistant Fit and holes to drain away water easily, keeping your feet dry and comfortable, while the stylish design and colours add zing to your outfit. Upper Quick drying coated canvas upper with contrast coloured stitch detailing and toggle straps Wide mouth for easy on/off Wrap-around toggle straps for a customised fit Mildly padded footbed with quick-drying property Drain holes on the medial side Outsole Transparent plastic ice outsole with anti-slip properties and drain holes for enhanced grip on wet surfaces Shoe care Wipe surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust
